problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: Combining Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
